query:
-- Upgrade 'review' items to 'matched' where a service was identified (low confidence but still a valid match)
-- These are NBN and Managed Voice Support items that partially matched
UPDATE billing_items 
SET matchStatus = 'matched', matchConfidence = 'medium'
WHERE billingPlatform = 'DataGate'
AND matchStatus = 'review'
AND serviceExternalId != '';

-- For Caravan and RV Works (C0054) - check what services exist for this customer
SELECT s.externalId, s.serviceType, s.planName, s.serviceTypeDetail, s.monthlyRevenue
FROM services s
WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0054' AND s.status = 'active'
ORDER BY s.serviceType;

-- For Caravan and RV Works (C0054) - check what services exist for this customer
